TI tried to see him today and he avoided me.

--- Jeanluc Brunel jeanluc@mc2mm.com wrote:

HI

Gerald has said this morning to his staff that he
was committed to E

He got the message that he was missing a great
opportunity.

You are the only one who can ask for the contract
the way you want it
signed, After all the pressure that he got today,
it seems to be the right
time.

I know that he will call you tomorrow

JL
